objective: Make the production Core image capable of starting its already-implemented model runtime by copying exactly the three public non-secret provenance files that researchd verifies, and prove the exact image inventory and AF_UNIX startup path.
executable_blocker: The exact R08A Core image exits before AF_UNIX readiness when model_runtime is configured because /opt/research-os/provenance/model-role-evaluation-v2.json and its two sibling bound inputs are absent from the image.
acceptance_commands: docker build --no-cache --platform linux/amd64 --build-arg RELEASE_SHA=<worker-head> -f ops/release/Containerfile -t dcr-r08b-r1-core:<worker-head> .
exact image file inventory contains src contracts and exactly model-role-evaluation-v2.json model-worker-ipc-extension-v1.json model-provider-routing-v1.json under provenance
non-null corridor_executor_profile plus RESEARCH_WORKER and CRITIC_DEEP available bindings reaches a 0660 AF_UNIX socket with network=none
stop_conditions: any dependency hash base branch ownership or catalog mismatch
any changed path outside the two-file write-set
Core image still cannot reach AF_UNIX readiness with model_runtime enabled
image inventory contains an extra provenance file or any forbidden/private path
test weakens an existing deny assertion or uses a fixture shortcut instead of the built image
runtime behavior requires source contract policy provider route or config mutation
rollback: Revert the two additive Containerfile/test changes on the nested branch; the parent R08B candidate remains null and no external or runtime state is authoritative.
